title: Partner Portal
description: Web application for partners to manage payment configurations, merchants, terminals, and financial operations in a centralized platform.
fullDescription:
Web application developed to provide partners with a complete platform for managing payment ecosystem configurations and financial operations. Unlike the Merchant Portal, which focuses on the merchant experience, this system is designed for partners to control and configure the entire operation layer. It includes management of merchants, terminals, settlement configurations, fee structures, and gateway settings. 

The platform offers detailed financial reports, including payments by card, boleto, and PIX, as well as receivables tracking, with export capabilities through CSV generation. Integrated into the GSurf ecosystem, it communicates with authentication, transaction, and settlement microservices, centralizing complex workflows that were previously fragmented.

Due to its high level of complexity, the system includes more than 600 components, supporting advanced configurations, role-based access control and scalable architecture, making it suitable for large-scale payment operations and partner management.
roleDescription: Worked as a Senior Frontend Engineer, acting as Tech Lead and Frontend Manager, responsible for leading the frontend architecture, mentoring developers, and coordinating the development team.
responsibilities: Implemented complex frontend features for partner-level management
Led frontend architecture for a large-scale and highly modular system
Acted as Tech Lead for frontend development
Coordinated frontend team tasks and deliveries
Reviewed pull requests and enforced code standards
Collaborated with backend, QA and product teams
Managed project priorities and technical decisions
Developed scalable and reusable UI components
Handled complex state management across hundreds of components
Implemented and maintained CI/CD pipeline for frontend deployment
